_note: Apply ALL relevant correction factors. Multiply together. The corrected rating is: Iz_corrected = Iz_tabulated × Ca × Cg × Ci × Cd. The cable is acceptable when Ib ≤ In ≤ Iz_corrected.

ambient_temperature._basis: Reference temperature is 30°C for cables in air, 20°C for cables in ground. Factor Ca.
ambient_temperature._note: For cables in ground (Methods D1/D2), use soil temperature correction factors from Table 4B2 instead.

soil_temperature._basis: For buried cables (Methods D1, D2) only. Reference soil temperature is 20°C. Factor Ca_soil.

grouping._basis: Number of circuits or multi-core cables grouped together. Factor Cg.
grouping._note: A circuit is one cable (single-core or multi-core) carrying load current. Neutral counted only if carrying significant current (e.g. harmonics). CPC not counted.

in_air_or_surface._condition: Cables bunched in air, clipped to surface, in trunking, or in conduit

in_ground_touching._condition: Cables direct buried or in buried conduit, touching (Methods D1/D2)

in_ground_spaced._condition: Cables direct buried, spaced ≥ 1 cable diameter apart (Methods D1/D2)
in_ground_spaced._note: Use Cg = 1.0 if cables are separated by ≥ 1× their own diameter.

thermal_insulation._basis: Factor Ci. Apply when cable is surrounded by or in contact with thermal insulation.

not_in_insulation.description: Cable not in or touching thermal insulation

one_side_only.description: Cable touching insulation on one side only

fully_enclosed_up_to_500mm.description: Cable fully enclosed in thermal insulation, run length ≤ 500mm

fully_enclosed_over_500mm._note: If run exceeds 500mm fully enclosed: derate significantly. Consult Table 52.2 or route cable outside insulation.
fully_enclosed_over_500mm.description: Cable fully enclosed in thermal insulation, run > 500mm — cable sizing calculation required per Table 52.2

depth_of_burial._basis: For buried cables only. Reference depth is 0.7m. Factor Cd.

soil_thermal_resistivity._basis: Reference soil thermal resistivity is 2.5 K·m/W. Factor Cs. Adjust if soil type is known.

harmonic_current._basis: When third-harmonic content of line current exceeds 15%, the neutral carries significant current. Upsize neutral or apply derating to phase conductors.

thd_below_15_percent.neutral_sizing: standard — size neutral same as phase

thd_15_to_33_percent.neutral_sizing: upsize neutral to 1.5× phase conductor cross-section

thd_33_to_45_percent.neutral_sizing: neutral same cross-section as phase, but it governs sizing
thd_33_to_45_percent._note: Size cable on neutral current, not phase current. Neutral current = 3× zero-sequence current.

thd_above_45_percent.neutral_sizing: upsize neutral to match phase — consider double-wound transformer
thd_above_45_percent._note: Consult harmonic analysis specialist. G5/5 compliance check required at PCC.

worked_example._description: 4mm² XLPE multi-core cable, Method B2, grouped with 4 other circuits, 35°C ambient, not in insulation
worked_example.verdict: Cable rated 17.28A after correction. Acceptable only if design current Ib ≤ 17.28A and protective device In ≤ 17.28A.
